children.heading: Allocation of funds
children.label: a Allocation of funds
children.text: Of the total amount appropriated for this subpart in any fiscal year, 70 percent shall be used to make grants under , 10 percent shall be used to make grants under , 10 percent shall be used to make grants under , and 10 percent for .section 10171(a)(1) of this titlesection 10171(a)(2) of this titlesection 10171(a)(3) of this titlesection 10171(a)(4) of this title

children.heading: Limit on grant share of cost
children.label: b Limit on grant share of cost
children.text: A grant made under paragraph (1) or (3) of may be made for an amount up to 75 percent of the cost of the correctional option contained in the approved application.section 10171(a) of this title

children.heading: Rules; report; request for applications
children.label: c Rules; report; request for applications

children.text: not later than 90 days after funds are first appropriated to carry out this subpart, issue rules to carry out this subpart; and

children.label: A
children.text: submit to the Speaker of the House of Representatives and the President pro tempore of the Senate, a report describing such rules; and

children.label: B
children.text: request applications for grants under this subpart.
